heading: Terminal railroad corporations and their shareholders
label: 281 Terminal railroad corporations and their shareholders

children.heading: Computation of taxable income of terminal railroad corporations
children.label: a Computation of taxable income of terminal railroad corporations
i
children.text: the portion of any liability of any railroad corporation, with respect to related terminal services provided by such corporation, which is discharged by crediting such liability with an amount of related terminal income, or

children.label: ii
children.text: the portion of any charge which would be made by such corporation for related terminal services provided by it, but which is not made as a result of taking related terminal income into account in computing such charge; and

children.label: B
children.text: no deduction otherwise allowable under this chapter shall be disallowed as a result of any discharge of liability described in subparagraph (A)(i) or as a result of any computation of charges in the manner described in subparagraph (A)(ii).

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: In the case of any taxable year ending after the date of the enactment of this section, paragraph (1) shall not apply to the extent that it would (but for this paragraph) operate to create (or increase) a net operating loss for the terminal railroad corporation for the taxable year.

children.heading: Computation of taxable income of shareholders
children.label: b Computation of taxable income of shareholders
children.text: Subject to the limitation in subsection (a)(2), in computing the taxable income of any shareholder of a terminal railroad corporation, no amount shall be considered to have been received or accrued or paid or incurred by such shareholder as a result of any discharge of liability described in subsection (a)(1)(A)(i) or as a result of any computation of charges in the manner described in subsection (a)(1)(A)(ii).

children.heading: Agreement required
children.label: c Agreement required
children.text: In the case of any taxable year, subsections (a) and (b) shall apply with respect to any discharge of liability described in subsection (a)(1)(A)(i), and to any computation of charges in the manner described in subsection (a)(1)(A)(ii), only if such discharge or computation (as the case may be) was provided for in a written agreement, to which all of the shareholders of the terminal railroad corporation were parties, entered into before the beginning of such taxable year.

children.label: A
children.text: all of the shareholders of which are rail carriers subject to part A of subtitle IV of title 49;

children.label: B
children.text: the primary business of which is the providing of railroad terminal and switching facilities and services to rail carriers subject to part A of subtitle IV of title 49 and to the shippers and passengers of such railroad corporations;

children.label: C
children.text: a substantial part of the services of which for the taxable year is rendered to one or more of its shareholders; and

children.label: D
children.text: each shareholder of which computes its taxable income on the basis of a taxable year beginning or ending on the same day that the taxable year of the terminal railroad corporation begins or ends.

children.label: A
children.text: from services or facilities of a character ordinarily and regularly provided by terminal railroad corporations for railroad corporations or for the employees, passengers, or shippers of railroad corporations;

children.label: B
children.text: from the use by persons other than railroad corporations of portions of a facility, or a service, which is used primarily for railroad purposes;

children.label: C
children.text: from any railroad corporation for services or facilities provided by such terminal railroad corporation in connection with railroad operations; and

children.label: D
children.text: from the United States in payment for facilities or services in connection with mail handling.

children.heading: Related terminal services
children.label: 3 Related terminal services
children.text: The term “related terminal services” includes only services, and the use of facilities, taken into account in computing related terminal income.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: e Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.
